전략 설명

[crypto_lob / spread_capture] LOB iter-2 전략: 최우선호가 수준 OBI(depth=1)가 심볼별 90번째 백분위수 임계값을 돌파하는 동시에, spread_bps < profit_target_bps 조건(spread gate)을 만족할 때 시장가 매수 진입.
iter-1 개선점: spread gate 추가 — iter-1에서 SOL 스프레드(~1.17 bps)가 PT(1.09 bps)보다 항상 넓어 구조적으로 수익불가임에도 신호가 발화된 버그를 수정. spread gate가 활성화되면 strategy.py는 spread_gate_bps_max = profit_target_bps로 설정하여 진입 전 스프레드 조건을 강제 검사.
시그널 근거: obi_1 x fwd_10t 신호가 BTC/ETH/SOL 전 심볼에서 avg_ic=0.2505, min_abs_ic=0.2352로 robust — signal_brief top_robust rank-1.
체결 방식: MARKET BUY (ask 가격), maker fee 0 bps (Binance 지정가 리베이트 가정, smoke 구성).
청산 우선순위: (1) time_stop 10 틱(~1초) — 주 청산 경로; (2) profit_target 1.09 bps / stop_loss 1.78 bps — 극단 경로 캡.
spread gate 효과: SOL은 스프레드가 1.09 bps를 초과하는 대부분의 틱에서 자동 배제. BTC/ETH는 스프레드 평균 ~0.05 bps로 gate 통과율 높음.
iter-1 parent lesson: lesson_20260420_001_lob_spread_gt_pt_blocks_symbol_before_obi_signal_can_work_implementation_bypass_invalidates_cross_symbol_alpha_assessment.
iter-1에서 BTC +0.267 bps, ETH +0.184 bps 실현 (fee=0 기준) — SOL은 구현 우회로 인해 alpha 평가 무효화됨.
IS 창: 2026-04-19 06:00-22:00 UTC (단일 일자, 단일 LOB 수집 세션).

파라미터
파라미터값
obi_thresholds{'BTCUSDT': 0.91469, 'ETHUSDT': 0.942049, 'SOLUSDT': 0.749589}
spread_gateTrue
entry_price_modeask
entry_ttl_ticks0
cancel_on_bid_drop_ticks0
profit_target_bps1.09
stop_loss_bps1.78
trailing_stopFalse
trailing_activation_bps0
trailing_distance_bps0
time_stop_ticks10
lot_size1
max_entries_per_session500
max_position_per_symbol1
손익 구조 및 수수료
항목값
왕복 비용수수료 (0.0 bps) + 매도세 (0.0 bps) = 0.0 bps
손익분기 승률손절 / (익절 + 손절) = 2 / (1 + 2) = 62.0%
손익비 (P:L)익절 / 손절 = 1 / 2 = 0.61 · lot = 1
최소 요구 edge실제 승률이 62.0%를 초과해야 0.0 bps 비용 후 수익 가능
유니버스 및 설정
항목값
종목BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT

지연시간제출 5.0 ms ± 1.0 ms 변동
spec.yaml (raw) 
name: lob_iter2_obi1_spread_gate
description: |
  [crypto_lob / spread_capture] LOB iter-2 전략: 최우선호가 수준 OBI(depth=1)가 심볼별 90번째 백분위수 임계값을 돌파하는 동시에, spread_bps < profit_target_bps 조건(spread gate)을 만족할 때 시장가 매수 진입.
  iter-1 개선점: spread gate 추가 — iter-1에서 SOL 스프레드(~1.17 bps)가 PT(1.09 bps)보다 항상 넓어 구조적으로 수익불가임에도 신호가 발화된 버그를 수정. spread gate가 활성화되면 strategy.py는 spread_gate_bps_max = profit_target_bps로 설정하여 진입 전 스프레드 조건을 강제 검사.
  시그널 근거: obi_1 x fwd_10t 신호가 BTC/ETH/SOL 전 심볼에서 avg_ic=0.2505, min_abs_ic=0.2352로 robust — signal_brief top_robust rank-1.
  체결 방식: MARKET BUY (ask 가격), maker fee 0 bps (Binance 지정가 리베이트 가정, smoke 구성).
  청산 우선순위: (1) time_stop 10 틱(~1초) — 주 청산 경로; (2) profit_target 1.09 bps / stop_loss 1.78 bps — 극단 경로 캡.
  spread gate 효과: SOL은 스프레드가 1.09 bps를 초과하는 대부분의 틱에서 자동 배제. BTC/ETH는 스프레드 평균 ~0.05 bps로 gate 통과율 높음.
  iter-1 parent lesson: lesson_20260420_001_lob_spread_gt_pt_blocks_symbol_before_obi_signal_can_work_implementation_bypass_invalidates_cross_symbol_alpha_assessment.
  iter-1에서 BTC +0.267 bps, ETH +0.184 bps 실현 (fee=0 기준) — SOL은 구현 우회로 인해 alpha 평가 무효화됨.
  IS 창: 2026-04-19 06:00-22:00 UTC (단일 일자, 단일 LOB 수집 세션).

capital: 1000000.0  # $1M USD — runner auto-scales × CRYPTO_PRICE_SCALE=1e8 for crypto_lob

universe:
  market: crypto_lob
  symbols: [BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT]
  time_window:
    start: "2026-04-19T06:00:00"
    end:   "2026-04-19T22:00:00"
  dates: []  # LOB 모드: date-partitioned 루프 없음 — time_window로 대체

fees:
  commission_bps: 0.0   # Binance maker fee 0 (지정가 리베이트 가정)
  tax_bps: 0.0          # 크립토: 매도세 없음

latency:
  submit_ms: 5.0
  jitter_ms: 1.0
  seed: 42

strategy_kind: python

params:
  # --- alpha params ---
  obi_thresholds:
    BTCUSDT: 0.91469
    ETHUSDT: 0.942049
    SOLUSDT: 0.749589
  # --- spread gate (NEW in iter-2) ---
  spread_gate: true         # if true, strategy.py sets spread_gate_bps_max = profit_target_bps
  # --- execution params ---
  entry_price_mode: ask       # MARKET BUY at ask — taker fill certainty
  entry_ttl_ticks: 0          # 0 = disabled (market order; no resting TTL)
  cancel_on_bid_drop_ticks: 0 # 0 = disabled
  profit_target_bps: 1.09
  stop_loss_bps: 1.78
  trailing_stop: false
  trailing_activation_bps: 0.0
  trailing_distance_bps: 0.0
  time_stop_ticks: 10         # PRIMARY exit — ~1 second at 100ms cadence
  lot_size: 1
  max_entries_per_session: 500
  max_position_per_symbol: 1

# DSL placeholders — strategy_kind=python; logic is in strategy.py (to be written by strategy-coder)
signals: {}
entry:
  when: false
  size: 1
exit:
  when: false

risk:
  max_position_per_symbol: 1

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Handoff metadata — preserved for audit traceability
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
handoff_metadata:
  parent_lesson: lesson_20260420_001_lob_spread_gt_pt_blocks_symbol_before_obi_signal_can_work_implementation_bypass_invalidates_cross_symbol_alpha_assessment
  signal_brief_rank: 1
  universe_rationale: >
    BTC/ETH/SOL full standard universe; SOL self-excludes via spread gate at runtime,
    preserving diagnostic visibility into SOL spread regime; BTC+ETH confirmed positive
    edge from iter-1 (+0.267/+0.184 bps at fee=0).
  escape_route: >
    If spread gate excludes >90% of SOL ticks and BTC+ETH combined n_trade falls below
    statistical floor, pivot iter-3 to passive LIMIT_AT_BID maker entry to restore full
    3-symbol universe viability.
  brief_realism:
    brief_ev_bps_raw: 0.38
    entry_order_type: MARKET
    spread_cross_cost_bps: 0.05
    brief_horizon_ticks: 10
    planned_holding_ticks_estimate: 10
    horizon_scale_factor: 1.0
    symbol_trend_pct_during_target_window: null
    regime_compatibility: unknown
    regime_adjustment_bps: 0.0
    adjusted_ev_bps: 0.33
    decision: proceed_with_caveat
    rationale: >
      Per microstructure_primer.md §1.1, BTC/ETH spread at top-of-book averages ~0.05 bps
      half-spread cost for MARKET entry; SOL is excluded by the spread gate so its 1.17 bps
      spread does not enter the EV calculation. Per fee_aware_sizing.md §2, fee_to_edge_ratio
      at real 4-bps taker = 94.7% — this iteration runs at fee=0 (smoke construct) confirming
      the gate fix; maker-only execution must be adopted before live deployment. Regime direction
      for 2026-04-19 LOB sample is unknown (single-day, no macro context), so regime_adjustment=0
      and proceed_with_caveat is the appropriate decision pending multi-day OOS confirmation.
  deviation_from_brief:
    pt_pct: -0.099
    sl_pct: 0.041
    rationale: >
      Baseline is top_robust[1] (obi_5/fwd_10t): pt_bps=1.21, sl_bps=1.71. PT held at
      iter-1 value 1.09 bps (-9.9% from brief): intra-horizon path concern — brief note
      states terminal-return approximation with no path simulation; tighter PT is more likely
      to trigger on real intra-horizon path than the nominal 1.21 bps terminal value, consistent
      with the time_stop-primary exit architecture where most exits are timed rather than
      limit-triggered. SL held at iter-1 value 1.78 bps (+4.1% from brief): gap-risk
      compensation — iter-1 observed 10/11 SL exits overshot spec by avg 3.5 bps due to
      100ms cadence gap; a slightly wider formal SL accepts the known gap risk at a calibrated
      level without masking it. Both deviations are within the ±20% band.
  draft_notes:
    alpha_draft_path: strategies/_drafts/lob_iter2_obi1_spread_gate_alpha.md
    execution_draft_path: strategies/_drafts/lob_iter2_obi1_spread_gate_execution.md
  agent_name: execution-designer
  model_version: claude-sonnet-4-6
  timestamp: "2026-04-20T06:30:00"
